title: ascochilus hirtulus
intro: Ascochilus hirtulus, also known as the hairy Ascochilus, is a species of orchid native to the tropical forests of Southeast Asia. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its use in traditional medicine to treat fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions. The health benefits of Ascochilus hirtulus include its anti-inflammatory and antipyretic effects, which can help reduce pain and fever. Herbal preparations of Ascochilus hirtulus often involve infusions or decoctions of the plant's roots or leaves, which can be used to make teas or tinctures for medicinal purposes.
